descriptors.name: grain size
descriptors.physical_meaning: characteristic length scale of crystalline grains
descriptors.rationale: fundamental microstructure parameter controlling mechanical properties

quality.loss_reason: reduces distribution to single statistical measure
quality.truncation_error: mean obscures grain size distribution shape
quality.notes: loses bimodal or skewed distribution information

descriptors.name: grain boundary misorientation
descriptors.physical_meaning: angular difference between adjacent grain crystal orientations
descriptors.rationale: determines boundary energy and migration behavior

quality.loss_reason: discretization into histogram bins loses precision
quality.truncation_error: binning resolution determines approximation error magnitude
quality.notes: spatial correlation and neighbor topology lost

descriptors.name: texture intensity
descriptors.physical_meaning: degree of preferred crystallographic orientation alignment
descriptors.rationale: quantifies anisotropy in polycrystalline material properties

quality.loss_reason: collapses full orientation distribution to scalar
quality.truncation_error: loses specific texture components and symmetry
quality.notes: different textures can yield identical intensity

descriptors.name: grain aspect ratio
descriptors.physical_meaning: shape elongation of grains in microstructure
descriptors.rationale: indicates processing history and directional properties

quality.loss_reason: averages distribution and loses orientation direction
quality.truncation_error: mean hides variation and principal elongation axis
quality.notes: no directional information about elongation axis

descriptors.name: grain boundary density
descriptors.physical_meaning: total grain boundary area per unit volume
descriptors.rationale: controls diffusion pathways and strengthening contribution

quality.loss_reason: redundant with grain size, loses topology
quality.truncation_error: grain shape assumptions introduce systematic error
quality.notes: assumes spherical grains for size conversion

descriptors.name: dislocation density
descriptors.physical_meaning: length of dislocation lines per unit volume
descriptors.rationale: determines strain hardening and stored deformation energy

quality.loss_reason: spatial average loses heterogeneous distribution patterns
quality.truncation_error: ignores dislocation type and arrangement structure
quality.notes: cell structures and tangles not captured

descriptors.name: stored energy
descriptors.physical_meaning: elastic energy from lattice defects and distortions
descriptors.rationale: driving force for recrystallization and recovery

quality.loss_reason: volume average masks spatial heterogeneity distribution
quality.truncation_error: local gradients driving recrystallization nucleation lost
quality.notes: different defect configurations give same average

descriptors.name: recrystallization fraction
descriptors.physical_meaning: volume fraction transformed to strain-free grains
descriptors.rationale: tracks microstructure evolution during annealing process

representation.encoding: real number between zero and one

quality.loss_reason: loses spatial distribution of recrystallized regions
quality.truncation_error: kinetics and nucleation site information absent
quality.notes: cannot distinguish nucleation versus growth stages

descriptors.name: grain boundary character distribution
descriptors.physical_meaning: classification of boundaries by misorientation and structure
descriptors.rationale: boundary type determines migration and diffusion properties

quality.loss_reason: categorization loses continuous misorientation angle information
quality.truncation_error: boundary plane normal orientation not included
quality.notes: coarse categories simplify complex five-parameter space
